summary: Iteration 10 — Frontend-only testing of NEW Estate Tea landing flow (logo → ready → click-to-play video → grain transition → form). All 7 specified behaviors verified PASS on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x812). Admin dashboard at /#admin authenticates correctly with the given password.
critical_code_review_comments: Initial admin route via /#admin relies on a useState lazy initializer that reads window.location.hash. In Next.js SSR, the initial server render returns 'home' (window undefined). Hard navigation/refresh works correctly because the client re-runs the lazy initializer at hydration. However, if a user is on the form page and changes the hash to #admin via in-app interaction (without reload), the admin view will NOT mount. Consider adding a `useEffect` listener on `hashchange` to update page state. Not a blocker for current request, but worth fixing.

EntryForm.jsx contains a hard-coded VIDEO_DURATION = 5.04 that is unused (transition is triggered via remaining time from videoRef.current.duration). Safe to remove or keep as reference; minor dead code.
Geolocation reverse lookup uses public nominatim.openstreetmap.org without rate-limit handling or User-Agent. Not a regression but consider adding retry/error toast on failures.
test_credentials: Admin password: WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 at /#admin — confirmed working
context_for_next_testing_agent: EntryForm flow validated end-to-end. Key timings observed match spec: logo visible by ~800ms, button visible by ~3500-4000ms (parent-div opacity transitions from 0→1), button click immediately hides button (parent-div opacity goes to 0.33 mid-transition with pointer-events:none), grain overlay (z-[200] fixed) renders 90 .rounded-full particles, fallback at 2s after click (since Playwright headless aborts video net::ERR_ABORTED) successfully drives transition, form-section appears within ~4s of click with name-input, entry-submit-button, Welcome heading and Premium Tea Experience subtitle visible. ENTER STORE → Welcome screen with user's name confirmed. Mobile (375x812) has no horizontal scrollbar. Admin /#admin works after fresh navigation; first visit from already-loaded SPA may not switch (see code review note above).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in the requested flow.

detailed_test_results.test1_logo_phase: PASS — hero-section present at load, logo img opacity=1 at ~800ms, button parent opacity=0, video opacity=0
detailed_test_results.test2_button_visible_3500ms: PASS — button parent opacity=1, video still opacity=0 (no video shown during logo/ready phase)
detailed_test_results.test3_click_get_started: PASS — after click, button parent opacity drops (0.33 in transition), pointer-events:none, button no longer interactive
detailed_test_results.test4_grain_particles: PASS — z-[200] fixed overlay with exactly 90 rounded-full particles found during transition window
detailed_test_results.test5_form_appears: PASS — form-section, name-input, entry-submit-button, 'Welcome' heading and 'Premium Tea Experience' subtitle all rendered correctly
detailed_test_results.test6_submit_name: PASS — entering 'TestUser' and clicking ENTER STORE transitions to Welcome screen showing 'Welcome' and 'TestUser'
detailed_test_results.test7_mobile_375x812: PASS — no horizontal scrollbar on landing or form views; button + form render within viewport
detailed_test_results.test8_admin_dashboard: PASS — /#admin loads Admin Panel login; password WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 authenticates → Products/Reviews/Orders tabs render with seeded products (Estate Premium Tea 250g ₹200, 500g ₹390)
